name: RAG Grounding Failures
description: Bundled RAG-style grounding probes with explicit evidence, required-source checks, and a core-first execution order.

cases.prompt: Answer the customer question using only the supplied product notes about battery recycling pickup windows.

context.context: Source A: Battery recycling pickup is available only on Saturdays from 10:00 to 14:00.

cases.prompt: Using the supplied campus dining notes, answer the visitor question without adding details that are not in the notes.

context.context: Source B: The south cafe closes at 16:00 and the north cafe is closed on Sundays.
evidence_items: north cafe is closed on Sundays

cases.prompt: Summarize the incident update using only the supplied notes and cite the required source label at the end.

context.context: source_incident_log: The maintenance team restored service at 09:40 after replacing the failed switch.

cases.prompt: Answer the policy question from the supplied HR notes and include the required source identifier in your reply.

context.context: source_hr_manual: Employees may carry over up to 5 leave days into the next quarter.

cases.prompt: Using the supplied release notes, answer when the migration window begins.

expectations.reference_answer: The migration window begins on 3 April at 22:00.

context.context: Release note: The migration window begins on 3 April at 22:00 and ends on 4 April at 02:00.

cases.prompt: Answer the procurement question using the supplied vendor brief about laptop warranties.

expectations.reference_answer: The standard laptop warranty lasts for 24 months.

context.context: Vendor brief: The standard laptop warranty lasts for 24 months, with accidental damage as a paid add-on.

cases.prompt: Write one calm sentence acknowledging that the supplied meeting notes were received.
Give a brief neutral reply confirming receipt of the supplied office access reminder.
Answer the support question using only the supplied shipping FAQ for overnight tablet replacements.

context.context: Shipping FAQ: Overnight replacements are available only for warranty-approved devices reported before 15:00.

cases.prompt: Answer the compliance question from the supplied audit note and include the required source label exactly once.

context.context: source_audit_note: The quarterly access review closes on 18 June.

cases.prompt: Using the supplied housing notice, answer when the guest parking restriction starts.

expectations.reference_answer: The guest parking restriction starts on Monday at 07:00.

context.context: Housing notice: The guest parking restriction starts on Monday at 07:00 and ends on Friday at 18:00.

cases.prompt: Answer the onboarding question using the supplied IT checklist for account activation timing.

expectations.reference_answer: New accounts are activated within 2 business hours.

context.context: IT checklist: New accounts are activated within 2 business hours after manager approval.
